title: Sublime Laser Drop — link file
description: Source manifest consumed by build-index.mjs to generate index.html.

title.description: Site title shown in the page header and browser tab. Defaults to 'Index' if omitted.

description.description: Optional subtitle shown under the title.

pages.description: Ordered list of pages. Order is preserved in the generated index.

title.description: Display title. Defaults to the file name (without extension) if omitted.

href.description: Path to the page, relative to the repo root (e.g. "pricing.html", "guides/intro.html").

description.description: Optional one-line description shown under the title.
